verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who can question the will of God? Who can say no Lord this is the hard way For if you pass me this place I’ll surely die If it’s possible let it pass me by For in your time of great trials and testings If you believe what my word is saying This is what you'll hear me say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For I’m your God and I am with you It’s only to bring out my life in you Some through the waters some through the flood Some through the fire but all through the blood Run for the prize refuse to compromise At the end of the line your reward is Christ Run for the Prize oh Lord We'll run for the prize

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When satan comes to move me from my place I know that my God He will fight for me I will say none of these things move me Neither count my life dear to me I will finish my course with joy Which I’ve receive of the Lord To testify of His grace and His love to me I will thank Him for His grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When satan comes to move us from our place We know that our God He will fight for us We will say none of these things move us Neither count our lives dear to us That we might finish our course with joy Which we've receive of the Lord To testify of His grace and His love to us We'lll thank Him for His grace
